name: Armenian Potato Salad with Red Onions and Green Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
1 Green pepper, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the potatoes, red onion, and green pepper with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper to taste.
2. Boil the potatoes in their jackets until they are barely tender. Allow them to cool enough to handle before cutting.
3. Cut the cooled potatoes into generous bite-size pieces while still warm.
4. Place the potato pieces in a large salad bowl along with the onion rings and green pepper. Mix well.
5. Add the minced parsley and lemon juice to the mixture. Gently toss everything together.
6. Drizzle the olive oil over the vegetables, then season again with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper. Toss once more and let the salad sit for several hours (or refrigerate and bring to room temperature before serving) so the flavors can meld.
7. This recipe serves 8 to 12 people and pairs well with roasted lamb, chicken, or simple fish recipes.
(From: CLASSIC COLD CUISINE by Karen Green, Jeremy P. Tarcher, Inc., Los Angeles. 1984. ISBN 0-87477-322-9)
